    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    ClientSideTestsBase
    The base class for client-side tests.
    DepartmentClientSideTests
    Client-side tests for Department.
    DepartmentMvcTests
    The tests for the Department with server-side support.
    EmployeeClientSideTests
    Client-side tests for Employee.
    EmployeeMvcTests
    The tests for the Employee with server-side support.
    MVCTestsBase
    The base class for tests with server-side support.
    TestA
    Unit testing with RestTestClient.bindToController(Object...).
    TestB
    Spring MVC testing with RestTestClient.bindTo(MockMvc) and MockMvc.
    TestC
    The integration testing with RestTestClient.bindToApplicationContext(WebApplicationContext).
    TestConstants
    Test constants.
    TestD
    The end-to-end testing with RestTestClient.bindToServer().
    TestDatasetLoader
    The loader for the test dataset.
    TestHelper
    The test helper.
